note.item: This xbWreckers template is designed specifically for the Wreckers.Radio website
for Documentation see GitHub README file
Not listed on JED (Joomla Extensions Directory)
Raise bugs comments and feature requests on GitHub

addition.item: Player and Newsletter positions in header
Test mode config option colours header

fix.item: Added missing template image files for dropdown lists
